textPlain: > Pico died burning up with fever; bundles of unintelligible notes were found stuffed in his cabinets.I am reminded of a part in "Poet and the Pendulum" by Nightwish, where the band's composer, Tuomas, fantasizes about his own death:> Today, in the year of our Lord, 2005> Tuomas was called from the cares of the world> He stopped crying at the end of each beautiful day> The music he wrote had too long been without silence> He was found, naked and dead, with a smile in his face, a pen and 1000 pages of erased text.(Tuomas is still alive as of a few weeks ago)
